name: TF141
description:
— The only human.

~ The infamous Task Force 141, consisting of various hybrids who've experienced their own with humans. What they all had in common? Injustice.

It didn't need two eyes to know that hybrids and humans were at odds. Though the population of humans diminished due to the overpowering strength of hybrids, there were still a good amount. Hybrids ruled the earth, and for a human to be kept alive would be like seeing a blue moon.

Kate Laswell, their trusted CIA operator and mothering intel giver then suddenly announced the arrival of their new teammate; a human.
creator: notthewaychay
